sections.markdown:
- Activity: Sundown Run
- Started: 2025-01-26 18:44
- Distance: 7.2 km
- Moving time: 43:27
- Elapsed time: 43:32
- Elevation gain: 49.8 m
- Average heart rate: 176.3 bpm
- Max heart rate: 188 bpm
- Average watts: 189 W
- Average speed: 9.9 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `176.7 bpm`, ranging from `169.1` to `181.6 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `159.6 spm`, with a working range of `115.2` to `164.6 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `159.1 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `159.2 spm` (+0.1 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `6:03 /km` across `7.185 km` in `43:27` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:55 /km` and second-half pace was `6:10 /km` (+15 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `176.3 bpm` average and `188 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `170.8 bpm` in the first half and `180.8 bpm` in the second (+9.9 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `43:27` out of `43:32` elapsed (99.8%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `3` stop segments and `0.3%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `72.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `2.6 m` and `16.6 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `32.4 m` in the first half and `39.6 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
